title: Mazars Comment The Bank Of England Should Be Worried About Russia
section_path: Mazars Comment The Bank Of England Should Be Worried About Russia
section_path_text: Mazars Comment The Bank Of England Should Be Worried About Russia
summary:
The Bank of England should be worried about Russia
By George Lagarias
The three things I would tell my clients this week
Inflation in the UK remains too high, compelling the central bank to tighten more aggressively. It is now reaching the point where policymakers might have to force a recession to break the inflation cycle. Potential instability from Russia comes at an inopportune moment.
